title: lyonia latifolia subsp. calycosa
intro: Lyonia latifolia subsp. calycosa, also known as the Coastal Lyonia, is a shrub native to the southeastern United States, particularly found in coastal regions and wetlands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Lyonia latifolia subsp. calycosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
